mapper.select: select * from sys_department where deleted = 0 order by sort_no asc, id asc
select * from sys_department where deleted = 0 order by sort_no asc, id asc limit #{offset}, #{pageSize}
select count(1) from sys_department where deleted = 0
select * from sys_department where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
select * from sys_department where deleted = 0 order by id asc limit 1
select * from sys_department where dept_code = #{deptCode} and deleted = 0 limit 1
mapper.update: update sys_department set parent_id = #{parentId}, dept_name = #{deptName}, dept_code = #{deptCode}, leader_user_id = #{leaderUserId}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, sort_no = #{sortNo}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select count(1) from sys_department where dept_code = #{deptCode} and deleted = 0 and (#{excludeId} is null or id <> #{excludeId})
